title: Bubble de House de *** The Animation

alternative_titles.ja: バブルdeハウスde○○○ THE ANIMATION

synopsis: Young student Daisuke accidentally applies for a women's only apartment and fills out the paperwork in a way that they think he's a girl. The other four girls living there agree to let him stay since he already moved out of his previous residence. When Daisuke accidentally walks in on one of the girls in the bath she invites him to stay to bathe together.
